headline: Nike Says It’s ‘Deeply Committed’ to Snkrs App After Speculation Swirls
summary: The company clarified its strategy for the platform on Saturday.

headline: Nike Tariff Lawsuit Tests Pricing Story And Brand Trust For Investors
summary: Nike, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is facing a proposed consumer class-action lawsuit alleging it kept tariff-related price increases in place after receiving tariff refunds. The case claims Nike did not pass tariff overcharge refunds back to shoppers, raising questions about its pricing practices and disclosure to consumers. The lawsuit adds legal and reputational risk for Nike at a time when the company is also dealing with regulatory investigations and operational restructuring. Nike is a global...

headline: Nike faces class action lawsuit accusing it of pocketing tariff refunds while charging consumers more
summary: Nike faces a class action lawsuit alleging it failed to refund tariff-related costs passed to consumers through higher prices on footwear and apparel.

raw.headline: Nike faces class action lawsuit accusing it of pocketing tariff refunds while charging consumers more
raw.summary: Nike faces a class action lawsuit alleging it failed to refund tariff-related costs passed to consumers through higher prices on footwear and apparel.

headline: Nike Faces Class Action Over Tariff Refunds
summary: Nike is the latest brand to come under fire from consumers seeking payback for the tariffs they say they paid in the form of higher prices at retail.

raw.headline: Nike Faces Class Action Over Tariff Refunds
raw.summary: Nike is the latest brand to come under fire from consumers seeking payback for the tariffs they say they paid in the form of higher prices at retail.
